rule_metadata.name: scp
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'scp' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule scp
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'scp' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "scp"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /scp\s.{0,1000}\s.{0,1000}\@.{0,1000}\:/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /scp\s.{0,1000}\@.{0,1000}\:.{0,1000}\s/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
